description: Production-ready user authentication system with email/password and social login support

userStories.title: Signup Validation & Types
userStories.description: Implement form validation for signup using zod schema
acceptanceCriteria: Form validation schema created with zod
Password strength validation enforced (min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special char)

userStories.title: Signup Backend Logic
userStories.description: Implement server-side signup handler using Supabase authentication
acceptanceCriteria: Signup handler created using Supabase auth.signUp

userStories.title: Signup UI Components
userStories.description: Create signup page and form components with error handling and browser verification
acceptanceCriteria: Signup form renders with email/password fields
Verify signup flow in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Login Backend Logic
userStories.description: Implement server-side login handler and session management
acceptanceCriteria: Login handler created using Supabase auth.signInWithPassword
Authenticated session created on successful login

userStories.title: Login UI Components
userStories.description: Create login page and form components with browser verification
acceptanceCriteria: Verify login flow in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Logout Backend Logic
userStories.description: Implement server-side logout handler using Supabase
acceptanceCriteria: Logout handler created using Supabase auth.signOut

userStories.title: Logout UI Components
userStories.description: Create logout button and integrate into navigation with browser verification
acceptanceCriteria: Verify logout clears session in browser using dev-browser skill
